Zambia National [No. 30 of 1982 239
Tender Board
GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA
ACT
No. 30 of 1982
Date of Assent: 24th Decern ber, 1982
An Act to provide for the establishment of the Zambia
National Tender Board; to regulate and control the
procurement of goods and services for the Government
and parastatal bodies; to consolidate the law relating
to tenders generally; and to provide for matters
connected with or incidental to the foregoing.
[*
ENACTED by the Parliament of Zambfa.
Ena.otment

rp
" Board" means the Zambia National Tender Board tion
established by section three;
" Chairman " means the Chairman of the Board appointed
under section four;
" company" means a company registered under th�
Companies Act; Cap. 686
" Director" means the Director of the Board appointed
under section fourteen;
11 member '' means a member of the Board;
" parastatal body " means a statutory corporation or
body, or a company in which the Government has a
majority or controlling interest, and includes a local
authority;
" Secretary" means tho person appointed under section
fifteen to be Secretary to the Board.
•This Act shall come into opora.tion on such date o.s the Minister may, by
statutory instn1ment, appoint.

sections.heading: ( 1) 'fho functions of tho Board shall be to regulate and Functions
sections.text:
of Board
control the procurement of goods and services for the Govern­
ment and parastatal bodies.
(2) Without prejudice to the generality of subsection (!),
the Board may-
(a) formulate rules and rogulations governing the pro­
curement of goods and services for the Government
and parnstata,l bodies;
(b) advertise locally and abroad tenders for tho procure­
ment of goods and services for the Government and
parastat.al bodies;
(r) regulate the procedures rolating to the <LWard of
contraets on behalf of the Government and parastatal
bodies;
(rl) formulate tbe conditions under which any rules and
regulations governing the procurement of goods and
services for the Government and parast,atal bodies
ma.�, be va.ried or waived.

(2) The Board may appoint as members of a committ.ee
established under subsection (I), persons who are or are not
members of the Board and such persons shall hold office for
such period as the Board may determine.
(3) Subject to any specific or general direction of tho Board,
any committee established under subsection (!) may regulate
its own proredul'e.
